description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in a casual, button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the elbows and a pair of fitted jeans. The figure stands upright with both arms relaxed at the sides and fists loosely clenched. The shirt is untucked, and the jeans are straight-cut, ending just above a pair of low-profile sneakers. The facial features are neutral, with short, neatly groomed hair and no visible facial hair. The shoes have a textured appearance, suggesting a practical, everyday style suitable for walking in urban environments. The overall build is average, with realistic body proportions and a natural stance.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure stands upright in a button-up shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with short hair and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, button-up shirt, jeans, and sneakers, with arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the shirt's rolled sleeves, and the straight leg of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, jeans, and both arms, with the head facing forward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, shirt, and jeans, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and straight-cut jeans
